use_cases: Multi-line text input for user-generated content in forms
Comment or feedback submission fields in applications
Long-form text entry for document creation interfaces
Message composition in chat or messaging applications
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable textarea component with three size variants (sm, md, lg) featuring subtle shadow effects, focus ring animations, and comprehensive accessibility support including disabled states, readonly mode, and aria-invalid error styling. Includes dark mode support for error states. Designed as a drop-in form input for any React application requiring multi-line text entry.
